title: IgnitionTestManifest
description: Manifest schema for the Ignition Perspective test automation system

project.description: Ignition project name as it appears in the gateway

gateway.description: Base URL of the Ignition Gateway used during discovery

generated_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of when the manifest was last generated

id.description: Stable identifier derived from the view path (e.g. view__home)

path.description: Perspective view path as returned by the API (e.g. /home)

url.description: Full URL to the view in the Perspective client

discovered_by.description: Which discovery pass found this view

reachable.description: Whether the browser pass could navigate to this view

requires_auth.description: Whether the view requires authentication to access

nav_path.description: Ordered list of nav labels that lead to this view (from browser pass)

warnings.description: Discovery discrepancies or issues flagged during reconciliation

testFlags.description: Which test types are enabled for this view
